ShortDescription.Value: This mod gives you access to a bunch of useful tools and assets for detailing your city.

Publish.LongDescription:
# [BETA] ExtraDetailingTools This mod is the BETA version of [ExtraDetailingTools](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/80528/Windows).
### I recommend reading this page on the website not in game, the game doesn't support all the formatting the web page does.
You can see the trailer video made by Sully in the "MORE ABOUT THIS MOD" section.
If you want example of builds that use this mod, you can check the about screenshots section lower in the description.
# Features: * Transform Tool (Gizmoz and in SIP) * More Snapping Options * ExtraAssetsMenu (Surfaces, NetLane and Decals) * NetLanes * Surfaces * Decals
## Transform Tool * The Transform Gizmos tool lets you move and rotate object using handles like in common 3D software like Unity, Blender, ... * The Transform UI appears when you select a compatible asset. This allows you to change the positioning and rotation of the object along the XYZ axis. You are also able to change the increment (↕) value. This can provide a lot more precision for positioning and rotation.
This menu also has a new 'delete' button, for all objects.
## Snap to surface toggle This is a feature found in the editor, now in game. This will allow you to place decals like graffiti and posters, on vertical walls. This can also be used to snap any object to any surface. From placing props on rooftops, right up to placing trees horizontally on walls.
## ExtraAssetsMenu
In the game's main navigation, you’ll find the ExtraAssetsMenu. In here you’ll find three different tabs:
### NetLanes Netlanes (NetTool) use the same functionality as road networks. It can be used to create network fencing, or road markings to any length. This tool is more versatile than using prop line tool with fence props.
### Surfaces There are many vanilla surfaces found in this tab. They are separated into categories such as ground, grass, tiles,...
### Decals Here you’ll find vanilla decals. There are decals to place on the ground, like road markings and stains, and decals you can place on vertical walls.
You’ll find this alongside the other snapping options in the games UI.
# About the screenshots - FewCandy's farm, you can find the full video about this build [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z_Fp8JWzQXg). - CloverPie's abandoned rail yard, you can find the full video of this build [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gOj35sN7DI8).
# Translation ⚠️ This mod uses Crowdin so there may be inconsistencies with translations due to translations from different translators ⚠️ - ✔️French 100% : aricoseco, Morgan Touverey Quilling (mtouverey) - ✔️Chinese Simplified 100% : RilkeXS(无手文) (RilkeXS), 一叶杳舟 (Yao_Zhou) - ⚠️Chinese Traditional 48% : Tiger Zhang (tiger42231), boan51204, Source Design (source_design) - ⚠️German 80% : Konsi, Kai Stammen (stammenkai), Fuchs23 - ❌Italian 0% - ❌Japanese 0% - ✔️Korean 100% : Twotoolus-FLY-LShst, Hinanchovo - ✔️Polish 100% : Lisek, karmel68 - ✔️Portuguese 100% -> [European Portuguese Localization mod](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/92599/Windows) - ✔️Portuguese, Brazilian 100% : Miguel Pereira Campos (mpcamposz), Matheus Bernardes da Rocha Reis (matheusbreis10) - ✔️Russian 100% : Mihail (kaktyc), Albert Antonyan (quoxsii) - ✔️Spanish 100% : Alex (AlexofCA), elGendo87
# Thanking I must particularly thank all the people who helped me in this major project which lasted several months : * CityRat : Thanks for all you did, testing the mod since the start, without you, I wouldn't have started EDT project. * Sully: planning, testing since EDT 3.0, promotions and your incredible build that you made with this mod, you gave me confidence in this project. * Yenyang : Without you, this mod wouldn't exist, thank you for all. * T. D. W. : Your help was precious, on various aspects of this mod. * Konsi (Mimonsi/kosch104) : Testing since EDT 3.0, feedback and good idea. I'm glad to see that your mods are appreciated. * Tigon Ologdring : Testing since EDT 3.0, feedback, and his good build ideas that helped to have faith in this project * Dome : Testing since EDT 3.0, feedback, you did a great job finding how to create custom station and other stuff to link to the pathfinding. * CanadianMoosePlays : Thanks for playing with EDT 3.0, even though it never saw the light at least somebody used it. * CodiakTheKodiak : Thanks for your streams that I watched while I was coding, you are a great streamer. * Jay : You destroyed my mod, I've never seen anyone use a mod so much, I'm glad I had you as a tester.
I also have to thank all the content creators who tried the mod and build amazing stuff, you can find them below with the link to their channel. - [Sully](https://www.youtube.com/@sully_skylines) - [Biffa Plays Indie Games](https://www.youtube.com/@BiffaPlaysCitiesSkylines) - [CanadianMoosePlays](https://www.twitch.tv/canadianmooseplays) - [City Planner Plays](https://www.youtube.com/@CityPlannerPlays) - [CodiakTheKodiak](https://www.twitch.tv/codiakthekodiak) - [FewCandy](https://www.youtube.com/@fewcandy) - [OVERCHARGED EGG](https://www.youtube.com/@OVERCHARGEDEGG) - [Slay3K](https://www.twitch.tv/slay3k) - [two dollars twenty](https://www.youtube.com/@twodollarstwenty)
Publish.ChangeLog:
### Improvements - Added Anarchy mod integration: toggle "Prevent Override" and "Transform Lock" directly from the Transform Gizmo Tool when moving static props. - The Transform Gizmo Tool's handle size is now configurable in the mod settings (50 to 500 px), and stays a constant size on screen regardless of distance or zoom. - Renamed "XZ Handle Mode" to "Sphere Handle Mode" for clarity.
### Bug Fixes - Fixed Delete Action not deleting sub areas belonging to sub buildings. - Fixed an issue where moving an object with the Move gizmo's "Follow Surface" handle could cause it to snap onto its own surface instead of the surface underneath it.
